hypotheses.description: Pre-registered Tier 1 research thesis: test whether the baseline causal directional target and feature set can produce stable post-cost directional edge across ES, CL, ZN, and 6E before any ES-only retuning or broader robustness work.
hypotheses.status_reason: Rejected by bounded Phase 9 Tier 1 market-balanced cost-clearability discovery smoke: STOP_BRANCH_PERMANENTLY. Control comparisons failed, ZN cost drag failed, and market contribution balance failed; this is oracle/feasibility evidence only, not alpha evidence or executable strategy PnL.

hypotheses.description: Pre-registered Phase 9 target-construction candidate requiring terminal 15m direction, cost clearance, and controlled adverse path excursion.
hypotheses.status_reason: Rejected by bounded smoke: STOP_UNDERPOWERED, duplicate-target overlap with first-hit proxy was 1.0, controls failed, market balance failed, and top-5 cost drag failed.

hypotheses.description: Pre-registered Phase 9 ES-only target-construction smoke candidate using next-open entry and 30-minute same-session directional extension labels.
hypotheses.status_reason: Rejected by bounded discovery smoke: STOP_UNSTABLE_FOLDS, only 1 of 4 discovery folds had positive top net, and total discovery top net was negative.

hypotheses.description: Pre-registered Phase 9 ES-only target-construction smoke candidate that fits continuous 30-minute long/short opportunity and risk components first, then tests whether predicted high-opportunity/low-risk setup rankings have stable realized rank uplift before any directional promotion.
hypotheses.status_reason: Rejected by bounded ES-only component-rank discovery smoke: STOP_UNSTABLE_RANK_UPLIFT, only 1 of 4 discovery folds had positive rank uplift, and aggregate top rank-score uplift was negative.

hypotheses.description: Pre-registered Phase 9 ES-only target-construction candidate testing whether post-opening-range acceptance outside the completed 30-minute opening range predicts same-session 30-minute continuation after costs, without reusing stopped terminal, barrier, VWAP-reversion, prior-extreme-failure, opportunity/risk, Tier 1 baseline, or cost-clearability rescue branches.
hypotheses.status_reason: Frozen after discovery, confirmation, and locked bounded ES-only target-construction smokes passed once. Discovery: DISCOVERY_PASS, top total net 37929.0, 4 of 4 positive folds. Confirmation: CONFIRMATION_PASS, top total net 45715.0, 4 of 4 positive folds. Locked: LOCKED_PASS, failure_count=0, all gates passed, top total net 50403.0, 4 of 4 locked folds positive, duplicate overlap 0.6320268179473956. This is target-smoke readiness evidence only; WFA/modeling, Phase 8, promotion, paper, and live execution remain unrun and require separate bounded approval.

pre_registration.research_question: After the first 30 minutes of the ES session, does a causal break and acceptance outside the completed opening range identify continuation opportunities over the next 30 minutes that are learnable from existing baseline features and survive cost-aware discovery gates?
pre_registration.entry_condition: Candidate event rows are ES rows after opening_range_30_ready where price is outside the completed opening-range high or low, with direction set by the side of the break. The future implementation must use only information available at the event timestamp for the entry condition.
pre_registration.target_definition: Use next-open entry, 30-minute same-session horizon, existing path-validity filters, non-overlapping events, configured ES costs, and a continuation label that requires the future path to clear round-turn cost ticks plus min_profit_ticks in the breakout direction.
controls: compare duplicate overlap with current 15m deadzone target
require fold-stability gates on ES_research_0001 through ES_research_0004
do not tune thresholds, features, costs, folds, markets, or years after seeing discovery output
pre_registration.discovery_success_rule: Discovery can advance only if the registered bounded smoke reports DISCOVERY_PASS with positive stage net, at least half of discovery folds positive, nonconstant predictions, sufficient event/class balance, and duplicate overlap at or below the registered cap.
stop_rules: STOP_INPUT_FAILURE on stale/missing registry, split, feature, cost, or matrix evidence
STOP_CLASS_COLLAPSE if long, short, or flat events fail minimum count or rate gates
STOP_DUPLICATE_TARGET if overlap with the current 15m deadzone target exceeds the registered cap
STOP_UNSTABLE_FOLDS if fewer than half of discovery folds have positive top net
STOP_DISCOVERY_NEGATIVE_NET if discovery top net is nonpositive
forbidden_actions: no WFA/modeling, Phase 8, promotion, paper, or live execution without separate bounded next-phase approval
no holdout or forward rows for selection
no threshold, feature, cost, fold, market, or year retuning after discovery output
no reuse as a new hypothesis if stopped
pre_registration.implementation_status: Implemented in the Phase 9 ES 30m target smoke harness; discovery, confirmation, and locked smokes passed once; next-phase work requires separate bounded approval.
